title: inula limosa
intro: Inula limosa, also known as the sea inula or sea dustwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the coastal areas of Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Inula limosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
